name: freelancers using QuickBooks processing 5–15 invoices/month tool
description: For freelancers using QuickBooks processing 5–15 invoices/month, inaccurate tracking of petty cash expenses causes cash flow gaps. We provide automated tracking and weekly summaries instead of manual tracking in spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Inaccurate tracking of petty cash expenses
features: manual entry of petty cash expenses
